# Domain Rules

<!-- Generated by /caveman-docs:ai-context. Manual edits overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS — Current state

### Overview
- Compression applies only to AI-oriented docs
- 3 interception points: SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse Write|Edit
- Flag file gates runtime activation; deletion = deactivation
- Human-facing docs always exempt, regardless of path match

### AI doc scope (compressed)
Patterns in `hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js:14-24`:
- `AGENTS.md` (any dir)
- `CLAUDE.md` (any dir)
- `docs/agents/*.md`
- `SKILL.md` (any dir)
- `agents/*.md`
- `commands/*.md`, `commands/*.toml`
- `.claude/*.md`
- `.cursor/rules/*.md[c]?`
- `.windsurf/rules/*.md`

### Human doc exemption
Patterns in `hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js:27-31` and `hooks/caveman-docs-tracker.js:43-52`:
- `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- Mentions of `confluence`, `jira`, `notion`, `wiki`, `pull.?request`, `PR.?description`, `commit.?message`
- Explicit `human.?readable`, `for.?humans?`, `normal.?docs?`

Implementing check: `isAIDoc(filePath)` in `hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js:33`. Human patterns tested before AI patterns — human match returns `false` even if path matches AI pattern.

### Intent detection (UserPromptSubmit)
Regex set in `hooks/caveman-docs-tracker.js:16-38`. Fires on:
- Verbs (`write|create|generate|update|refresh|add|make`) within 40 chars of `AGENTS.md` / `CLAUDE.md` / `SKILL.md` / `docs/agents`
- Concepts: `ai.?context`, `agent.?context`, `agent.?docs?`
- Slash commands: `/ai-context`, `/caveman-docs`, `/init`
- `bootstrap` + `ai|agent|context|docs?`

Implementing class: `AI_DOC_WRITE_PATTERNS` regex array in `caveman-docs-tracker.js`.

### Deactivation
Prompt matches `stop caveman-docs` / `disable caveman-docs` / `normal docs` (`caveman-docs-tracker.js:55-59`) → flag file `~/.claude/.caveman-docs-active` unlinked. Subsequent prompts and writes pass through without reminder injection.

Re-activation: next SessionStart recreates flag (`caveman-docs-activate.js:14`).

### Flag semantics
- Flag present → caveman-docs active
- Flag missing → deactivated (hooks skip injection)
- Flag creation symlink-safe (`safeWriteFlag` uses `O_EXCL | O_NOFOLLOW`, `caveman-docs-activate.js:46-76`)

## TO BE — Prescribed pattern

No ADRs in scope.
